title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala
jsonLd.description:
La Opala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!
